155 _43A TRNSFR_1_DT (43A) First Interruption Date DATE 8 The date when the patient leaves the inpatient rehabilitation facility in a program interruption situation (Item 42 - a situation where a Medicare inpatient is discharged from the inpatient rehabilitation facility and returns to the same inpatient rehabilitation facility within 3 consecutive calendar days).
156 _43B RTRN_1_DT (43B) First Return Date DATE 8 The date when the patient returns to the inpatient
